meta.notes: Authoritative public-release build. Real England/Scotland split via each wave's 'Region United Kingdom' variable (England=regions 1-5,7,8,10,11; Scotland=region 6). Worry/experience removed. Proportions over full non-null base (DK in denominator); DK/Refused dropped from output.
